action_set_definitions.name: get_radar_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-update radar telemetry for specific aircraft, including current heading, altitude, airspeed, and lateral offset from the runway centerline.

callsigns.description: List of aircraft callsigns to track (e.g., ['DAL112', 'AAL45']).

action_set_definitions.name: check_ntz_status
action_set_definitions.description: Monitors the No Transgression Zone (NTZ) between the two parallel approach paths and identifies if any aircraft has breached the safety buffer.

action_set_definitions.name: get_comms_config
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the current communication channel availability and equipment state (e.g., frequency status, data link availability) to determine the appropriate protocol for issuing commands.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_breakout_command
action_set_definitions.description: Issues an immediate PRM breakout instruction to an aircraft. This is a high-priority command to turn and climb/descend to a safe vector.

heading.description: The new magnetic heading to fly.

instruction_text.description: The specific phraseology used (e.g., 'TRAFFIC ALERT, DAL112, TURN LEFT IMMEDIATELY HEADING 050, CLIMB AND MAINTAIN 4000').

comms_channel.description: The frequency or channel to use.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_separation
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the current lateral and vertical separation between two aircraft to confirm if safety standards have been restored.

state_description.simulation_time: Current simulation timestamp in seconds from start.
state_description.aircraft_queue: List of aircraft currently in the approach sector.
state_description.runway_availability: Status and next available landing time for each runway.
state_description.separation_violations: Flag indicating if minimum separation standards are currently breached.
